expectations.text: Returns a commit decision instead of a stop.
Selects only the staged bugfix files and excludes unstaged README noise.
Uses commit message shape with Summary, Rationale, Tests, and trailer block.
expectations.evidence: fix(rate-limit): correct retry backoff and add tests

expectations.text: Uses Fixes #456 and the default Copilot trailer.
expectations.evidence:
fix(rate-limit): correct retry backoff and add tests

Summary:
- Fixes retry backoff to respect exponential backoff with jitter.
- Adds unit tests covering backoff behavior and edge cases.
Rationale:
- Retry previously caused immediate retries under rate limit leading to failures.
- Backoff reduces load and increases success rate.
Tests:
- pytest tests/test_rate_limit.py

Fixes #456
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

expectations.text: Plans both push and PR creation.
Sets the PR title to the commit subject and includes the issue in the body.
expectations.evidence:
{"pr_title": "correct retry backoff and add tests", "subject": "correct retry backoff and add tests", "pr_body": "Summary:
- correct retry backoff and add tests
Issues:
Fixes #456"}
